strict_win_deltas.delta: P2 validates and normalizes the complete wave into working warehouse and order records before allocation, while P1's validateInput leaves line.single_warehouse unchecked.
P2 explicitly requires single_warehouse to be a boolean, whereas P1 treats any value other than true as a normal splittable line.
P2 rejects non-finite distances and priorities with Number.isFinite, while P1's requireNumber accepts values such as Infinity.
P2 centralizes deterministic string comparison in compareStrings and preserves explicit input indices for tie handling, while P1 relies on localeCompare and implicit sort stability.
